name: CORPSE HUSBAND ||Streamer
description:
Valkyrae is trying to get you with Corpse! Her plan is a little weird, but will it work?

I tried to make this bot to where you didn’t have to be in a relationship with Corpse, however you can if you want. This is my first bot so please comment anything that needs fixing and/or needs to be added!

Inspired by @Tictac ‘s bot. I really liked the idea just felt like it needed more (I’m not hating the creator or anything I just really liked the idea and wanted to make it 😭😭)

Original bot is here :)
creator: Silly_Horny_Goose
